PG Programme in
Applied AI & Agentic Systems

A hands-on 15 month programme where you build AI agents every term.

Apply Now

PG Programme in
Applied AI & Agentic Systems

Format

Offline/Online

Weekday offline for graduates; Weekend online designed for working professionals.

Cohort Starting

Jun '26

Applications Open

Eligibility

BCA/B.Tech

For graduates and professionals with up to 5 years of experience.

Duration

15 months

Including live projects & Internship

Apply Now Apply Now
  • Highlights
  • Curriculum & Faculty
  • Admissions & Fees
  • Career Prospects

Designed For Future AI Engineers,
Machine Learning Engineers, and CTOs

Build an AI-powered chatbot for customer support

Python | R | SQL | TensorFlow | PyTorch | Scikit-learn | Keras | NLP

Build an autonomous AI agent to automate real business workflows

Agents | Tool Use | APIs | FastAPI | LangChain | Function Calling

Detect fraud in transaction data using classification models

Decision Trees | Random Forests | SVM | XGBoost | LightGBM

Develop a sales forecasting model for retail businesses

Regression | Time Series Forecasting | Anomaly Detection | K-Means Clustering | Scikit-learn

Fine-tune a recommendation engine for an e-commerce site

Hyperparameter Tuning | Cross-Validation | Model Ensembling | Feature Engineering

Build a fairness analysis tool for hiring algorithms

Bias Mitigation | Fairness in AI | Interpretability | Model Transparency | Scikit-learn | Data Privacy (GDPR)

Optimize supply chain logistics using reinforcement learning

Reinforcement Learning | Q-Learning | TensorFlow | Keras | Decision Trees

Build an AI-powered chatbot for customer support

Python | R | SQL | TensorFlow | PyTorch | Scikit-learn | Keras | NLP

Build an autonomous AI agent to automate real business workflows

Agents | Tool Use | APIs | FastAPI | LangChain | Function Calling

Detect fraud in transaction data using classification models

Decision Trees | Random Forests | SVM | XGBoost | LightGBM

Develop a sales forecasting model for retail businesses

Regression | Time Series Forecasting | Anomaly Detection | K-Means Clustering | Scikit-learn

Fine-tune a recommendation engine for an e-commerce site

Hyperparameter Tuning | Cross-Validation | Model Ensembling | Feature Engineering

Build a fairness analysis tool for hiring algorithms

Bias Mitigation | Fairness in AI | Interpretability | Model Transparency | Scikit-learn | Data Privacy (GDPR)

Optimize supply chain logistics using reinforcement learning

Reinforcement Learning | Q-Learning | TensorFlow | Keras | Decision Trees

Choose Your Learning Path

Offline Weekday Programme

On-Campus, Gurugram - WeekDays
  • For freshers with BCA / B.Tech / CS-related degree (final year or recent graduate)
  • Full-time, on-campus learning in Gurugram with studios, labs, and mentor sessions every weekday
  • Build agents in teams, collaborate daily, and participate in campus build sprints and hackrooms
  • Includes placement support & internship assistance for first-time job seekers

Online Weekend Programme

Weekend Live Classes + Flexible WeekDays
  • For working professionals in tech roles
  • Live weekend classes & self-paced weekday work designed to fit alongside a full-time job
  • Apply everything directly at work, build agents for your current role or organisation
  • Includes career transition support and portfolio positioning for role shifts into Applied AI

The Masters' Union Edge in
Applied AI

Experience a world-class curriculum, unparalleled mentorship, and real-world impact that will
accelerate your journey to becoming an AI leader.

Learn from Leading
AI Experts and CTOs

Courses taught by executives from Microsoft, Google, and top tech companies, along with exclusive mentorship.

1

1:1 mentorship from AI leaders at Amazon

2

Masterclasses by global AI experts and influencers

3

1:5 mentor-to-student ratio for personalised guidance

Real-World Application of
AI & Agentic Systems

Co-built with PwC, Ola Krutrim, and Rabbit AI, our curriculum emphasises application and impact.

1

Develop real-world AI solutions for industries

2

Hands-on projects using industry-standard tools

3

Real-time case studies and interactive workshops

Establish Your
Presence in the AI Community

Learn how to build a strong online presence and showcase your expertise in AI through industry-specific platforms.

1

Publish your models and research on GitHub

2

Start an expert series on LinkedIn or YouTube

3

Attract employers with high-value AI insights

Enhance Communication and
Leadership Skills

Develop critical soft skills that will set you apart in the fast-paced AI industry.

1

Sharpen leadership and decision-making abilities

2

Learn how to communicate complex AI concepts clearly

3

Build confidence in executive-level presentations

Learn from Leading

Learn to Build
Cutting-Edge AI Solutions

Every term, build an industry-grade AI solution, from chatbots and agents to ML models, RAG systems, and domain-specific applications.

Term 1 Develop AI Tools
Term 2 Apply in Industry
Term 3 Develop AI Tools
Term 4 Apply in Industry
Term 5 - 6 Develop AI Tools

Applied AI Chatbot Challenge

Build AI chatbots that solve real-world problems and improve processes. Examples include:

Create advanced AI chatbots that solve one meaningful use case by combining Python, LLM APIs, and no-code tools.

Build a wellbeing chatbot using basic psychological principles to help users manage stress & anxiety.

Create a study buddy chatbot to assist students with subject knowledge and doubt solving.

Design a customer support chatbot for handling FAQs and product queries.

LLM API Integration (OpenAI / equivalent)
Data Structures & Data Handling Basics (Pandas, CSV/JSON)
Prompt Engineering & Conversational UX
Chatbot Workflow Design
Basic Automation Testing for chatbot behaviour

Agentic AI Accelerator for Business

Build autonomous, tool-using AI agents that automate org workflows and integrate with live data sources.

Develop AI agents that reduce man hours and boost team productivity. Examples include:

Automate HR Operations (onboarding, payroll, leave management) for a large IT consulting firm.

Generate ad creatives and design variants for digital marketing for an online D2C brand.

Automate procurement across 100+ products for an automotive manufacturing plant.

Process Automation & Workflow Analysis
Autonomous Agent Development
Data Engineering & Data Wrangling for agents
API Integration
Data Visualisation for ops decision-making

AI Application in Industry:
ML Consulting Garage

Transform business data into actionable insights using supervised and unsupervised ML.

Create actionable insights backed by data to solve a company-specific problem. Examples include:

Use clustering algorithms to segment customers for companies like Myntra or Zomato.

Build a churn-prediction model for a subscription business to identify high-risk customers.

Develop a sales-prediction model for an e-commerce brand to optimise marketing spend.

Unsupervised Learning Models
Supervised ML Models
Exploratory Data Analysis
Business Data Analysis
Feature Engineering & Data Preprocessing
Model Evaluation & Interpretation
Framing ML insights

RAG System Building Challenge

Build powerful, domain-specific AI assistants using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that deliver accurate, traceable answers on top of private data.

Deploy a RAG system that answers 1,000+ product-specific customer queries without human intervention. Examples:

Design a legal document summariser to assist lawyers with case preparation.

Build a medical assistant to support doctors in diagnostics and second opinions.

Create an educational assistant to support researchers in their thesis development.

Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
LLM Fine-Tuning
Embeddings & Indexing
Query Optimisation
Prompt Orchestration
Information Retrieval
Neural Network Fundamentals
Monitoring & Evaluation of RAG systems

AI Immersion in Retail, Health, and Finance

Build and deploy domain-specific AI solutions that are reliable, compliant, and market-ready.

Design industry-ready AI solutions and secure 3–5 real paying clients. Examples include:

Create a system that automates supplier selection and inventory management for a retailer.

Develop an AI system for early disease diagnosis (e.g., cancer risk) through medical record analysis.

Build a reinforcement learning–based portfolio optimisation system to balance risk and return.

Supervised Learning
Data Architecture Awareness
Model Evaluation at scale
Domain Constraints & Regulation
Reinforcement Learning
Adaptive Learning Systems
Predictive Modelling
AI Governance & Ethics
Data Interpretation
Term 1
Term 2
Term 3
Term 4
Term 5-6
Develop AI Tools

Applied AI Challenge

Create advanced AI Chatbots using ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude AI, & no-code tools by leveraging APIs, open source codes and training data.

Acquire 5 B2B clients targeting revenue of INR 5 Lac+ in sales.
Examples include:

Build a wellbeing chatbot using psychological principles to help users manage stress & anxiety.

Create a study buddy chatbot to assist students with subject knowledge and doubt solving.

Design a customer support chatbot for handling FAQs and product queries.

AI Model Customisation
B2B Sales
API Integration
Data Structures
Data Analysis
AI Chatbot Development
Product Development
 Linear Algebra
Model Training
Automation Testing

Build autonomous, tool-using AI agents that automate org workflows and integrate with live data sources.

Develop AI agents that reduce man hours and Examples include:

Automate HR Operations (onboarding, payroll, leave management) for a large IT consulting firm.

Generate ad creatives and design variants for digital marketing for an online D2C brand.

Automate procurementacross 100+ products for an automotive manufacturing plant.

AI-Driven Product Development
Customer Experience Optimisation
 Personalisation Algorithms
Computer Vision
Retail Analytics 
Demand Forecasting

Transform business data into actionable insights using supervised and unsupervised ML.

Create actionable insights backed by data to solve a company-specific problem. Examples include:

Use clustering algorithms to segment customers for companies like Myntra or Zomato.

Build a churn-prediction model for a subscription business to identify high-risk customers.

Develop a sales-prediction model for an e-commerce brand to optimise marketing spend.

Autonomous Agent Development
Operational Efficiency

Workflow Analysis
Data Engineering

RAG System Building Challenge

Build powerful, domain-specific AI assistants using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that deliver accurate, traceable answers on top of private data.

Deploy a RAG system that answers 1,000+ product-specific customer queries without human intervention. Examples:.

Design a legal document summariser to assist lawyers with case preparation.

Build a medical assistant to support doctors in diagnostics and second opinions.

Create an educational assistant to support researchers in their thesis development.

AI-Driven Diagnostics
Personalised Education Solutions
 Healthcare Automation
Predictive Analytics
Medical Data Analysis
Recommendation Systems
AI-Assisted Decision-Making
Machine Learning
Adaptive Learning Technologies
Academic Data Tracking
Develop AI Tools

AI Immersion in Retail, Health, and Finance

Build and deploy domain-specific AI solutions that are reliable, compliant, and market-ready.

Design industry-ready AI solutions and secure 3–5 real paying clients. Examples include:

Create a system that automates supplier selection and inventory management for a retailer.

Develop an AI system for early disease diagnosis (e.g., cancer risk) through medical record analysis.

Build a reinforcement learning–based portfolio optimisation system to balance risk and return.

LLM Fine-Tuning
Custom Model Deployment
Query Optimisation
Prompt Engineering
Domain-Specific AI Training
Reinforcement Learning
Natural Language Processing Big Data Handling
Data Architecture
Deep Learning Fundamentals

Student Entrepreneurs

Reyansh Juneja, Founder, Memotag: A hardware-AI solution designed to help dementia patients, which was also pitched at Shark Tank India’s finale.

Kabir Teria, Founder, theGoodBrowser: A large action model-based AI browser that is likely to rival even Google Chrome.

Ansh Mamgain, Founder, AIOS: An AI-based operating system that adapts to users rather than the other way around, much like Jarvis.

Tanvee Maheshwari, Co-founder, SEMS: A Student Experience Management System, aimed to streamline student communication, updates, and deadlines.

Aashwin Dev, Founder, Bhupesh Chatbot & Elite: An AI chatbot that mimics professors to help classmates prep smarter and a SaaS tool for hiring already in pilot.

Arjun, Founder, Glam Girls Dress Up Haven: A fashion-focused dress-up game currently in beta, already engaging over 40,000 paying users worldwide.

Build with Our Expert Community

Surround yourself with AI engineers, researchers, founders, and practitioners who ship real systems. You’ll learn in public, get feedback that actually moves your work forward, and grow inside a community that builds together.

1

Publish on GitHub & HuggingFace and build a portfolio.

2

Work in small squads with weekly code & model reviews.

3

Ship 6 deployable AI agents across real industry use cases.

4

Get guidance from practicing AI engineers every term.

5

Present your work at community demos & OSS showcases.

“I've sent the Push Request”

“Merge with main branch”

“Ship via PRs into live repos”

In the News

Coverage and features highlighting Masters’ Union across leading media platforms.

World-Class Campus in the Heart of Gurugram

Book a Campus Tour

Explore with an
AI-Packed Curriculum

Immerse into our cutting-edge AI-packed Curriculum, tailored to showcase real-world applications and innovation.

Enabling You to Excel
Inside and Outside the Classroom

Foundations of Programming

Master Python, math for ML, and clean coding practices to establish a strong technical base for everything that follows.

  • In Class | Core Courses

How to use Python to manipulate, clean, and organise data for analysis?

How to understand data, machine learning, and AI with core Mathematics?

How to write clean, modular, and reproducible code that supports AI projects?

Data Analytics & AI Foundations

Use statistics, SQL, visualisation, and prompt engineering to explore data, uncover insights, and build your first functional AI chatbot.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to use statistics to describe, summarise, and understand data?

How to leverage SQL to query, filter, and join datasets efficiently?

How to use visualisations to communicate insights with clarity?

How to build simple chatbots using prompting and basic APIs?

How to identify business problems worth solving and evaluate solutions?

Applied AI Chatbot Challenge

Build an end-to-end AI chatbot by identifying a concrete use case, engineering stable prompts, and integrating Python workflows with LLM APIs to deliver a functional, measurable intervention

Agents & Automation with Modern AI

Learn how agent architectures, APIs, and classic ML methods combine to automate workflows and power real business operations.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to understand and apply modern agent architectures in real-world workflows?

How to design prompts, tool schemas, and constraints for agent reliability?

How to integrate external tools into agent workflows?

How to test, validate, and evaluate agent performance?

How to deploy and monitor agent-based systems?

How to use basic machine learning models to make predictions?

How to design and run operations inside organisations, and decide where automation fits?

Agentic AI Accelerator for Business

Develop autonomous, tool-using agents that can fetch data, reason over it, and complete multi-step organisational workflows, from planning to execution, without human supervision.

Applied Machine Learning for Real Decisions

Build, evaluate, tune, deploy, and communicate ML models that directly influence business strategy and operational outcomes.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to use unsupervised learning to discover hidden patterns in data?

How to build and evaluate supervised ML models for classification and regression?

How to transform raw data into ML-ready features?

How to tune models for higher accuracy without overfitting?

How to deploy lightweight ML models as APIs?

How to use clear communication to turn data into influence and action?

AI Application in Industry: ML Consulting Garage

Translate a business problem into an ML decision framework, select and justify the right modelling approach, and deliver analyses that drive pricing, retention, segmentation, or forecasting decisions.

RAG, Neural Networks & Data Engineering

Construct scalable RAG systems, understand neural networks, and engineer robust data pipelines that keep AI products running reliably.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to use embeddings and vector databases in practice?

How to ingest, chunk, and clean documents for retrieval?

How to evaluate RAG systems?

How to deploy scalable RAG applications?

How to build monitoring & feedback loops for RAG systems?

How to build machines that can see, hear, and understand patterns like humans?

How to build the invisible highways that move data at scale?

RAG System Building Challenge

Design and deploy a retrieval-augmented generation system that ingests private data, retrieves the right context, produces grounded outputs, and maintains accuracy under realistic scale and load.

Domain AI & Enterprise ML Design

Apply supervised learning, forecasting, RL, and domain constraints to design AI solutions that are accurate, ethical, and compliant.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to design AI solutions around domain constraints?

How does the blueprint of your data system decide the future of your AI projects?

How to prepare for ML & AI technical interviews?

Electives (Choose 1)

How to apply computer vision in real-world pipelines?

How to apply reinforcement learning to real decision problems?

How to build streaming data pipelines and real-time AI systems?

AI Immersion in Retail, Health, and Finance

Build domain-specific AI systems by scoping real operational problems, choosing appropriate modelling or RL techniques, handling regulatory constraints, and validating the solution against real business requirements.

MLOps, Governance & AI Leadership

Master CI/CD for ML, monitoring, system design, and responsible AI to deliver enterprise-grade solutions and lead AI initiatives.

  • In Class | Core Courses
  • Out Class

How to deploy AI products reliably with CI/CD + monitoring?

How to build AI that is powerful, fair, and trustworthy?

How to prepare for ML/AI system design + behavioral interviews?

Electives (choose 1)

How to design AI features for product teams (PM + AI integration)?

How to build multimodal AI systems?

How to harness AI for strategy, innovation, and business impact as a leader?

Continuation: AI Immersion in Retail, Health, and Finance

Build domain-specific AI systems by scoping real operational problems, choosing appropriate modelling or RL techniques, handling regulatory constraints, and validating the solution against real business requirements.

Mastering Generative AI with
Varun Mayya’s Masterclass

Varun Mayya visited Masters’ Union to teach students how to work with generative AI, covering its impact on content creation, the fundamentals behind how it works, and what it could mean for the future of jobs. Watch the video to know more.

Enrollment Checklist
Admissions Criteria

01.
Academic Readiness

01.
Academic Readiness

A bachelor’s degree with a solid foundation in logical or quantitative thinking. STEM backgrounds are preferred, though strong analytical aptitude from any discipline is valued.

02.
Experience (If applicable)

02.
Experience (If applicable)

1-5 years of experience, ideally in a technology, data, or product-driven role, demonstrating comfort with structured problem-solving and decision-making.

03.
Technical Inclination

03.
Technical Inclination

Should have curiosity and comfort with technology, shown through coding exposure, analytics tools, or other data-focused tasks.

04.
Critical & Analytical Thinking

04.
Critical & Analytical Thinking

Capability to approach complex problems logically, interpret patterns, and make reasoned conclusions, assessed through the Tech Assessment and interview.

Application
Timeline & Process

Rounds Application Fees Status Action
Round 1 Fee 500/- Active Apply Now
Round 2 Dec '24 - 28th Feb '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 INR 3,000/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now
Round 3 15th Mar '25 - 14th May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 Mar/Apr/May '25 INR 3,500/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now
Round 4 18th May '25 - 16th Jul '25 Jun/Jul '25 Jun/Jul '25 INR 4,000/- Closed Aug '25 Apply Now

01.

Complete the
Application

01.

Complete the
Application

Requirements

Share Your Background & Motivation

Begin by filling out the online application form with your academic history, professional experience, and personal details.

You will need:

  • Academic transcripts (BCA / BTech or equivalent)

  • Proof of professional experience (if applicable)

  • Basic identity details

  • Any certifications, projects, or achievements that strengthen your profile

Video Essay

  • As part of your application, please submit a 2-minute video introducing yourself and your journey so far. Share your interest in building a meaningful career in AI, why you believe you’re a strong fit for the programme, and how it aligns with your goals over the next 2–3 years.

  • Keep it simple and authentic—no editing or production polish is required. Upload the video to Google Drive, ensure the access is set to “Anyone with the link can view,” and submit the link in Part 2 of your application form.

02.

Take the
Scholastic Technical Test

02.

Take the
Scholastic Technical Test

Requirements

Assess Your Problem-Solving & Analytical Skills

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to take the Masters’ Union Scholastic Technical Test, designed to evaluate:

  • Logical Reasoning

  • Mathematics & Statistics

  • Programming Fundamentals

The Masters’ Union Scholastic Technical Test is a timed, adaptive online assessment designed to evaluate your Logical Reasoning, analytical thinking, and problem-solving skills. Practice Test can be found here.

03.

Technical
Interview

03.

Technical
Interview

Requirements

About the Interview

Shortlisted applicants will proceed to an in-person technical interview, conducted by practising data scientists, AI engineers, or faculty members.

You’ll be assessed on:

  • Foundational reasoning around Python, data, or AI concepts

  • How you break down a problem

  • Your curiosity, approach, and willingness to learn

  • Your ability to think structurally under pressure

04.

Admission
Decision

04.

Admission
Decision

Requirements

Status of Evaluation

The admissions committee will take a holistic view of your candidacy, considering your application, Scholastic Aptitude Test performance, technical interview, and overall fit for this intensive AI programme, before making a final decision. Applicants will be placed into one of three categories:

Accepted

  • Candidates offered admission will receive their decision along with the financial structure for the upcoming programme, and will have 7–21 days to confirm their seat by paying the admission fee.

Waitlisted

  • Masters’ Union does not maintain a ranked waitlist. Waitlisted applicants will be offered admission only if seats open up in the cohort. The committee reconvenes regularly to review and promote candidates from the waitlist to the accepted pool.

Rejected

  • Applicants who are not selected may reapply to the programme in the next cohort.

Fee Structure

Non-Refundable Fee Timelines
 Non-Refundable
Admissions Fee 		15 Months
Tuition Fees 		Tuition Fees
20% Scholarship 		Tuition Fees
30% Scholarship 		Tuition Fees
50% Scholarship
Before 31st May, 2026 INR 75,000/- - - - -
Programme Commencement
(Before start of classes) 		- INR 10,95,000/- INR 8,76,000/- INR 7,66,500/- INR 5,47,500/-
Mid-Programme Installment
(After 3 months) 		- INR 10,95,000/- INR 8,76,000/- INR 7,66,500/- INR 5,47,500/-
Total INR 75,000/- INR 21,90,000/- INR 17,52,000/- INR 15,33,000/- INR 10,95,000/-

*$78,000 converted to INR based on the 1:90 exchange rate. Actual amount will be dependent on the prevailing exchange rate at the time of study.


Scholarships

Based on your academic record, professional experience, and personal circumstances, you may be eligible for merit-based or need-based scholarships.

Merit-Based Scholarships

Scholarships awarded to learners who demonstrate exceptional academic strength, professional experience, and technical aptitude.

Need-Based Scholarships

Support for candidates facing financial constraints, ensuring talent is never limited by affordability.

Scholarships

Based on your academic record, professional experience, and personal
circumstances, you may be eligible for merit-based or need-based scholarships.

Merit-Based Scholarships

Scholarships awarded to learners who demonstrate exceptional academic strength, professional experience, and technical aptitude.

Need-Based Scholarships

Scholarships awarded to learners who demonstrate exceptional academic strength, professional experience, and technical aptitude.

100%

Maximum merit-based programme fee received by a student.

90+

Scholarships available for the postgraduate batch.

100%

Loan coverage for the programme and hostel fees.

Parents' Perspective-
The Masters’ Union Transformation

Witnessing their child evolve into a confident, ambitious, and industry-ready professional is every parent’s dream. At Masters’ Union, our hands-on, immersive approach ensures that students not only excel academically but also develop real-world skills, leadership qualities, and an entrepreneurial mindset. Hear from parents who have seen this transformation first-hand.

Inside the Union Stories

Download Student Report

Seerat Virk

Jayshree Periwal High School, Jaipur

Class of 2027

“In my 1st year at Masters' Union, I am doing 3 internships, heading events, and building two businesses, simultaneously. In 6 months, I have honed so many skills.“

1/10

Shaily Dangi

Indus International School, Bangalore

Class of 2027

“I believe that the value Masters' Union offers with their practitioners and industry experts as faculty distinguishes learning from others, even those abroad.“

2/10

Yashovardhan Karnawat

Neerja Modi School, Jaipur

Class of 2027

"I have had the opportunity to learn from professors of Harvard, Wharton, and Stanford and even CEOs of unicorn companies. Their perspectives helped me understand how businesses scale globally.“

3/10

Chirag Naryani

The Sanskaar Valley School, Bhopal

Class of 2028

“When I got to know about Masters' Union, I knew this was where I wanted to go. And trust me, seeing my skills and confidence grow in just a few months, I have never been more proud of my decision.“

4/10

Shabad Saxena

Billabong High International School, Noida

Class of 2028

“The professors here are not just ordinary college professors; they are real-life business leaders who teach you via their own experiences and experiments in the business world.“

5/10

Gaatha Todi

Sarala Birla Gyan Jyoti School, Guwahati

Class of 2028

“I am 18, and I am already running a dropshipping business. From launching my startup, to vendor negotiations, getting customer feedback and earning revenue & profits, it has been an incredible learning experience.“

6/10

Vedish Kuksha

Acharyakulam School, Haridwar

“Our campus is literally the best, from bumping into CEOs in the elevator to having big industry giants like Samsung & Aviva right across the floor, the environment fosters you to become a business leader from Day 1.“

7/10

Atishay Jain
